## Problem

What UI/UX risk should this rule catch?

## Why It Matters

Explain the product impact for users or reviewers.

## Bad Example

```tsx
// Code UIQA should flag.
```

## Good Example

```tsx
// Code UIQA should allow.
```

## Suggested Severity

- [ ] low
- [ ] medium
- [ ] high
